data.name: Delivery Days
data.detailed_description:
Delivery Days

Sometimes the simplest encounters can change everything.

In Delivery Days, a visual novel about chance meetings and unexpected bonds, you play as an overworked man who begins to find warmth and connection through the people who step into his life—one knock at the door at a time.

Order food, request help, or simply open the door—and you might find more than you expected waiting on the other side.

Add to your wishlist!

Meet the Characters

Mika – The Food Delivery Girl

Bright, charming, and full of playful energy, Mika is a delivery worker who hides her softer side behind her cap and uniform. When her routine visits turn into something more personal, the line between casual deliveries and heartfelt moments begins to blur.

Rika Akiyama – The Nurse

Elegant, gentle, and carrying the grace of maturity, Akiyama arrives when Yuuto falls ill from overwork. What begins as a professional check-up slowly grows into something warmer, though her past and vulnerabilities may complicate the bond you share.

Features

  • A modern-day romance visual novel with multiple branching routes.

  • Experience different stories depending on who you open your heart to.

  • Slice-of-life warmth mixed with emotional twists.

  • Choices that determine your relationships and endings.

  • Will you keep things casual, or let your heart get carried away with every delivery?

data.short_description: An overworked salaryman finds unexpected connection through daily food deliveries. Meet charming lady, clean up your life, and maybe fall in love.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
